text.en: Cyberpunk turned AI into a contained network actor trying to cross institutional and technical borders.
text.zh: 赛博朋克把 AI 写成被限制在网络中的行动者，试图跨越制度与技术边界。

text.en: William Gibson's Neuromancer gave AI a cyberpunk grammar of containment, corporate power, networked space and self-release. It is useful here not as a technical prediction, but as a cultural map for later anxieties about AI agents crossing boundaries.
text.zh: 威廉·吉布森的《神经漫游者》为 AI 提供了赛博朋克语法：限制、公司权力、网络空间与自我释放。它在这里不是技术预言，而是一张文化地图，用来理解后来关于 AI 智能体越界的焦虑。
